description_long: This is a rectangular book with a pixelated, illustrated front cover featuring a dynamic figure in dark tones against a tan background. The book's cover art appears to depict a person in motion, possibly holding a weapon, rendered in a stylized, blocky manner reminiscent of retro video game graphics. The back cover is a uniform tan color with a subtle block pattern, lacking any visible text or imagery. The spine is thin and light-colored, with no discernible text or design elements visible from the side views. The book appears to be of standard thickness, suggesting it is a typical paperback or hardcover. The overall color palette is dominated by shades of tan, brown, and black, giving it a vintage or fantasy-themed appearance.
description: A rectangular book with a pixelated illustrated cover showing a dynamic figure, mostly in tan and brown tones. The back is plain with a blocky tan pattern, and the spine is thin and light-colored.
description_view_0: The front cover displays a pixelated illustration of a figure in motion, with a tan and brown color scheme.
description_view_1: The spine is thin, light-colored, and lacks visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: The back cover is plain with a blocky tan pattern and no visible imagery or text.
description_view_3: The opposite edge of the spine, similar to view 1, is thin and light-colored with no visible features.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a pixelated, stylized illustration of a figure in motion, possibly wielding a weapon, set against a tan background. The art style is reminiscent of retro video game graphics, with blocky shapes and limited color shading. The overall impression is dynamic and action-oriented.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is light-colored and plain, with no visible text, patterns, or decorative elements.
